column3: 01: With our total household income we are able to fulfil all our needs & also end up saving some money
02: With our total household income we are able to fulfil all our needs but don‟t end up saving
03: With our total household income, we are not able to fulfil all our needs and face some difficulty
04: With our total household income, we are not able to fulfil our needs and face a lot of difficulty
